titles.title: Teach Me Lord to Be Humble

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Last night when I'm down on my knees I prayed with tears Asking God to forgive me For they say I did something And they put the blame on me Once more Lord, have mercy on me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Teach me Lord to be humble Not to lean to my own Let Your Spirit be with me And Your love flow through me In everything I do and say Let Your Name be praised

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Last night when I'm down on my knees I prayed with tears Asking God to forgive me Something happened while I pray I felt His loving care Once more, Oh Lord Give answers to my prayer
